title: C@dom #5467
definition:
Sodom = "burning"

 1) a Canaanite city, usually paired with Gomorrah, located in the
     area of the Dead Sea and the Jordan river; both cities destroyed
     by God in judgment
nasbUsage:
Definition: Sodom = "burning"

 1) a Canaanite city, usually paired with Gomorrah, located in the
     area of the Dead Sea and the Jordan river; both cities destroyed
     by God in judgment

    NASB:  a Canaanite city near the Dead Sea
